name: p401-spec
description: Spec-Up configuration for the P401 specification

scripts.spec:render: node --input-type=module -e "const { default: specUp } = await import('spec-up'); specUp({ nowatch: true });"
scripts.spec:edit: node --input-type=module -e "const { default: specUp } = await import('spec-up'); specUp();"
scripts.spec:dev: node --input-type=module -e "const { default: specUp } = await import('spec-up'); specUp({ dev: true });"
